title: Nexus (Lambda-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Lambda''-class}}
{{Otheruses|Nexus}}
[[File:Nexus_shu.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] ''Nexus'' en route to dock with Shuttle [[Fairfax (Lambda-class)|''Fairfax'']].]]
The '''''Nexus''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, led by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]], at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ''Nexus'' docked with [[Habeen]] Shuttle [[Fairfax (Lambda-class)|''Fairfax'']] to finalize arrangements for completed hyperdrives and citizenship of the Habeen.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
